scripts.dev: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend & npm run dev -w agent-core
scripts.build: npm run build -w agent-core && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w agent-core
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w agent-core
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w backend && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w agent-core
